name: Candy Bar Meltaways
recipeIngredient: 17 ounces refrigerated sugar cookie dough (or other flavor)
1 bag Milky Way Jr. candy bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Slice the cookie dough into 1/4-inch slices and place them in a lined 13 x 9-inch pan.
3. Press the slices together to form a crust.
4. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
5. Remove from oven and arrange candy bars over the crust.
6. Return to oven for 2-3 minutes, or until the candy softens slightly.
7. Using a spatula, quickly spread the softened candy evenly over the entire surface.
8. Sprinkle chopped nuts over the candy, pressing them in gently.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars (approximately 36 pieces).
